name: Google Business Profile Post
hero_h1_text: Maximize Your Local Reach with Professional Google Business Profile Posts
hero_paragraph: Engage, Inform, and Attract – Let us manage your Google Business Profile posts, so you can focus on growing your business!
section_about_us_description: Are you looking to optimize your Google Business Profile? Our expert team is here to help, offering tailored post content that aligns with your overall marketing goals and boosts your local visibility.
service_card_desp_1: Content strategy for your GBP posts that aligns with your business’s overall marketing goals. Determine the type of content that will be postedand the posting frequency that works best for your brand.
service_card_desp_2: Engaging and relevant content for the GBP posts, which includes writing text, creating or sourcing images.
service_card_desp_3: Service that scales as per your need. We can support businesses with 1 to 1000s of locations with ease.
service_card_desp_4: Measure success with detailed analytics reports that help you track growth and engagement metrics.
process_card_desp_1: We start with understanding your business, audience, and goals to tailor our GBP post strategy.
process_card_desp_2: Develop a tailored content calendar that aligns with your brand objectives and marketing goals.
process_card_desp_3: Post, monitor, and tweak the strategy based on performance analytics and customer feedback.
benefits_card_para_1: Keep your business's Google profile active and engaging without lifting a finger.
benefits_card_para_2: Boost interactions through targeted content and timely posts.
benefits_card_para_3: Maintain a cohesive and professional brand image with high-quality posts and consistent messaging.
client_review: What set Synup apart from all other placed we looked is their dedication to their customers and their clients. It feels like a relationship, they’re really there to help you.
client_name: - Kristen Dillon, VP of Operations, Zoek
faq_para_1: The post frequency is customizable, depending on your needs. Our standard plan covers a certain number of Google posts a month. You can opt for additional posts.
faq_title_1: How many Google posts will you manage?
faq_title_2: Can I resell this service to my customers?
faq_para_2: Yes, our reseller partners can resell managed services to their end customers. We will take care of the regular tasks, while you focus on strategy for your clients.
faq_title_3: Do I need to be a Synup customer to use managed services?
faq_para_3: Yes, you have to be subscribed to one of our products to be able to use our managed services.
faq_title_4: Will you need access to my Google profile?
faq_para_4: Yes, we will connect your google profile account to our platform to post content regularly.
last_section_heading: With Synup's managed services, you can leverage the full potential of GBP without lifting a finger.

seo.title: Done for You Google Business Profile Posts
seo.description: Engage, Inform, and Attract – Let us manage your Google Business Profile posts, so you can focus on growing your business!
